### 2141126
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E17 - An Almost Eggless Easter**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:01  
⌛ April 22, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141126&mediaid=9e78656fd8c06ffdd1915c0a0aa00df967e222c2) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/an-almost-eggless-easter-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141126` mediaid=`9e78656fd8c06ffdd1915c0a0aa00df967e222c2`  
_When the Easter Bunny's beautifully-painted eggs are drained of their color, it looks like Dibble will miss her first Easter egg hunt - she's really been looking forward to it. The Bears must find a way to repaint all the eggs before the big day._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141126_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
